high.mackenzie.snowflake
Class Parser

java.lang.Object
  high.mackenzie.snowflake.Parser
All Implemented Interfaces:
IParser
public final class Parser
extends java.lang.Object
implements IParser

An instance of this class is a parser that is based on a Parsing Expression Grammar.

Method Summary
 Trace getTrace()
          This method returns a record describing stages of the most-recent parsing-attempt.
 ParserOutput parse(char[] input)
          This method parses a character-array using the grammar.
 ParserOutput parse(java.lang.String input)
          This method parses a string using the grammar.
 
Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Method Detail

getTrace

public Trace getTrace()
This method returns a record describing stages of the most-recent parsing-attempt.

The returned list may be useful for debugging grammar and/or finding syntax-errors.

This method is provided here, because invalid grammars may cause stack-overflows. When using the Snowflake GUI, finding information regarding the stack-overflow is helpful. However, the trace-records cannot be obtained, because no parser output was created.

Returns:
the aforedescribed record.

parse

public ParserOutput parse(char[] input)
This method parses a character-array using the grammar.

Specified by:
parse in interface IParser
Parameters:
input - is the character-array to parse.
Returns:
the result of the parsing attempt.

parse

public ParserOutput parse(java.lang.String input)
This method parses a string using the grammar.

Equivalence: parse(input.toCharArray())/code>

Specified by:
parse in interface IParser
Parameters:
input - is the string to parse.
Returns:
the result of the parsing attempt.
